hero.title: Teaching programming, algorithms and digital skills to students.
hero.name: Oruzbaeva Nurgul Ishenbekovna
hero.intro: I prepare learners for programming competitions, school projects and future digital careers through hands-on lessons.

about.title: About me
about.intro: A snapshot of my teaching experience, classroom approach and student-focused practice.

bio.first: I am a computer science teacher who truly loves my subject and modern technology. I believe computer science is not just about computers and programming, but also about developing logical thinking, creativity and problem-solving skills.
bio.second: I enjoy sharing my knowledge and making lessons engaging and clear. It is important that students not only learn the material, but also apply it in practice, grow their abilities and confidently explore the digital world. I aim to keep lessons supportive and help every student unlock their potential.
